geographic_restrictions: Primarily serves Connecticut, with a focus on the Western Connecticut region (Waterbury and surrounding areas).
project_area: Senior centers and services, including meal programs, social services, transportation, legal services, health and fitness, adult day care, senior center services, fuel assistance, homeless shelter services, and in-home services for elderly or disabled adults.
demographic_requirements: Primarily serves elderly or disabled adults, caregivers, and individuals with disabilities in the Western Connecticut region.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, senior centers, human service organizations, and charities operating in Connecticut, particularly those focused on senior services, aging populations, or disability support. The Western Connecticut Area Agency on Aging (WCAAA) funds programs that align with its mission to provide comprehensive services for seniors, caregivers, and individuals with disabilities to maintain independence and quality of life.
